title: Vlad Stamate
text: Home * People * Vlad Stamate Vlad Stamate [1] Vlad Stamate , an American computer scientist, software and game developer with Romanian roots. He studied at Politehnica University of Bucharest and graduated in CS with a B.Sc. degree in graphic design from Richmond, The American International University in London in 2001. Actually affiliated with Apple , Vlad Stamate worked in the R&D department of Sony Computer Entertainment America , leading the GPU performance analysis software team for the Playstation 3 console, and as an engineer for Imagination Technologies taking part in developing OpenGL Linux drivers [2] . He has published various articles of the advanced rendering techniques book project ShaderX [3] . and further started chess programming in 2006 on a program called ps3chess , followed by ps3chess2 , fastthink and in January 2009, Plisk [4] . As collector of old and antique computers since 2012, Vlad Stamate features the Digilogue Museum [5] , along with the Digilogue Collection YouTube channel [6] .
